blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,673 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 63".
